title: Executive Order 5908—Public Water Restoration No. 12, California
text:
So much of the order of withdrawal dated May 17, 1927, creating Order of Withdrawal for Municipal Water-Supply Purposes, as affects the lands hereinafter listed is hereby revoked:
San Bernardino Meridian
T. 3 S., R. 23 E., sec. 14, lots 1, 2, 3, 4;
sec. 23, lots 1, 2, 3, 4;
sec. 25, lots 1, 2;
sec. 26, lots 1, 2, E. ½ SE. ¼;
sec. 36, lots 1, 2.
T. 4 S., R. 23 E., sec. 2, lots 3, 4, 5, 6;
sec. 11, lots 1, 2, 3, 4, E. ½ SW. ¼;
sec. 14, all (fractional);
sec. 23, lots 1, 2, 3, 4, E. ½ NW. ¼, SW. ¼ SE. ¼;
sec. 26, lots 1, 2, 3, 4, W. ½ E. ½;
sec. 35, lots 1, 2, 3, 4.
T. 5 S., R. 23 E., sec. 1, lots 1, 5, SE. ¼ NW. ¼, E. ½ SW. ¼;
sec. 12, lot 1, W. ½ NE. ¼, NE. ¼ SE. ¼.
All public lands in the following-described sections which lie within 50 feet of the proposed location of a conduit to carry water from Colorado River as shown on a map (Exhibit J) accompanying the application of the City of Los Angeles for a right of way filed in the General Land Office under Los Angeles 043640:
T. 2 S., R. 5 E., sec. 22.
T. 3 S., R. 6 E., secs. 4, 10, 24.
T. 5 S., R. 10 E., secs. 30, 32.
T. 5 S., R. 14 E., secs. 13, 23.
T. 5 S., R. 15 E., secs. 13, 22, 23, 24.
T. 5 S., R. 16 E., secs. 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 34, 35.
T. 5  S., R. 17  E., sec. 31.
T. 6  S., R. 17  E., secs.  5,  6,  7, 8,  9, 15, 17, 21, 22, 23, 26, 27,  35.
T. 7  S., R. 17  E., secs.  1,  2,  12.
T. 7  S., R. 18  E., secs.  6,  7,  8, 17, 18, 20, 21, 22, 26, 28, 34.
T. 7  S., R. 19  E., secs.  9,  10, 13,  14, 15, 17, 19, 20, 21, 29, 30, 31.
T. 7 S., R. 20 E., secs. 13, 14, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23.
T. 5 S., R. 21 E., sec. 35.
T. 6 S., R. 21 E., secs. 1, 2, 11, 14, 22, 23, 26, 27, 33, 34.
T. 7 S., R. 21 E., secs. 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 17, 18.
T. 5 S., R. 22 E., secs. 19 to 31, inclusive.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
August 22, 1932.
